title: 熊猫布布便携恒温杯 tips for outdoor family days
subtitle: Warm milk at the park, in minutes
voiceover_20s: Hard to warm a bottle at the park? Outdoor feeds should not mean cold milk or long waits. Portable heating that keeps up with your park day. Small enough for the diaper bag, ready at the bench. Save this for your next park day.

storyboard.visual: 公园遛娃：近景口播/问题特写
storyboard.voiceover_en: Hard to warm a bottle at the park?
storyboard.subtitle_en: Hard to warm a bottle at the park?
storyboard.visual_prompt: 公园遛娃：近景口播/问题特写；产品：熊猫布布便携恒温杯；人群：经常带娃出门；场景：公园遛娃（全片统一，禁止混入其他场景）；产品为可充电加热保温杯（独立于奶瓶，圆柱杯体）；用法：奶液倒入杯内加热保温，再倒出到奶瓶喂哺；禁止：把奶瓶放进杯内、奶瓶插入杯口、奶瓶浸在杯中加热（不是奶瓶暖奶器）；竖屏9:16
storyboard.seedance_prompt: Hook shot opening, park outing with baby, sharp close-up of portable rechargeable milk-warming thermos cup, matte lavender purple cylindrical body, metallic purple band with nurture wise branding, white studio product reference product hero on bedside table, separate baby bottle beside it, cinematic soft light, subtle push-in, no person face, no medical claim, vertical 9:16, TikTok product ad style. USAGE: rechargeable insulated milk-warming thermos cup (cylindrical cup body), separate from baby bottle; pour milk INTO the cup to warm, then pour warm milk OUT into baby bottle for feeding; FORBIDDEN: placing baby bottle inside the cup, bottle-in-cup warming, submerging bottle in cup; not a bottle-in-warmer device. Mood: Hard to warm a bottle at the park?
